title: THE pvp pack
description: This Texture Will Help You With PVP.
body:
# 
This Minecraft Texture Pack Will Help You With Minecraft PVP.

# How will this Texture Pack help you?

Well, This Texture Pack Will Make The Fire Texture MUCH Lower on your screen, so it will not have block nearly half your screen when you're in a PVP Battle.

# Shorter Items

So Yes This Texture Pack Will Also Make Item's such as Food, Potions, Todems and even EnderPearls smaller!

# Armor

So when you add enchantments to you arrmor. This will add a nice looking glow to your arrmor or items that are enchanted and even some enchantment books and food items such as "Enchanted Golden Apple."

# Better looking textures

This Texture Pack will even make End Crystal's 3D, And Makes the "Fire" Texture just look much better. And will also Make the Netherite Sword have a green inside.
check the gallery if you want to see the item's
